name: Class: scopeDutyCycleDefinition
title: Class: scopeDutyCycleDefinition
description: This structure defines the threshold levels for the duty cycle measurement.
tables: Maximum voltage level of a recessive bit
Maximum voltage level of a dominant bit
Minimum voltage level of a recessive bit
Minimum voltage level of a recessive bit
Defines the minimal voltage level for a dominant bit level in mV.
Defines the maximal voltage level for a dominant bit level in mV.
Defines the minimal voltage level for a recessive bit level in mV.
Defines the maximal voltage level for a recessive bit level in mV.
